subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! The glance of loving-kindness is turned towards thee, and the Supreme Pen is, like unto lightning, engaged at every moment in making mention of the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم لحاظ عنایت بتو متوجه و قلم اعلی بذکر دوستان در کل احیان کالبرق
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @power of prayer
